title: Cheaper Netherite
description: Makes both  Netherite Ingots and Upgrade Smithing Templates cheaper by ~25%. Adds scrap in fortress chests.
body:
## Quality of Life
This datapack makes Netherite Ingots and Netherite Upgade Smithing Templates cheaper by approximately 25%. It is ideal for anyone who wishes to get the full Minecraft experience but prefers to have the monotonous grindy parts shortened.
- Release 1.1: Adds a small chance (equal to the armor trim's) for Netherite Scrap to spawn in fortress chests and balances by equally reducing the chance of finding diamonds in them. This adds Netherite to the game's natural progression.
## Execution
- This is an extremely simple and generic datapack that served me well as a beginner project.
- No AI was used.
- The game balance remains practically the same.
